name: the-nineteenth-chamber
description: Personal tech companies ticket/ERP system - The Nineteenth Chamber

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:api-gateway" "npm run start:auth-service" "npm run start:customer-service" "npm run start:ticket-service" "npm run start:order-service" "npm run start:invoice-service" "npm run start:pdf-service"
scripts.install-all: concurrently "npm run install-frontend" "npm run install-auth" "npm run install-gateway" "npm run install-customer" "npm run install-ticket" "npm run install-order" "npm run install-invoice" "npm run install-pdf"

author: Zach Barbarich
